title: STUDIO Sample — FlowDesk Explainer Ad

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @Amara-001: identical presenter face, wardrobe, neutral set, same eye-line — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Seamless-Neutral-001: identical neutral grey seamless — same backdrop tone mid-grey #9A9A98, same floor sweep, same subject-to-backdrop distance, same falloff — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. Presenter addresses camera directly, crisp opener, neutral grey seamless backdrop. locked medium, snap attention Neutral seamless 5500K bilateral soft key locked — symmetrical wrap, subtle nose shadow only, zero hue drift, no magenta vignette, no warm/cool lateral split. Neutral 5600–6500K even field — shadow definition for shape only, no gel, no warm practicals in frame. COLOR LOCK Seamless-Neutral: backdrop #9A9A98±2%, skin true-to-life, wardrobe colors accurate, no gel spill — no magenta edge gradient, no orange spotlight cone. GRADE LOCK Cool-Clinical: grey axis neutral, skin neither pink nor yellow pushed, saturation -15% global — forbid magenta tint, forbid orange warmth, forbid teal skin on shadows, forbid vintage fade. Locked-off or slow linear track; no handheld. concept: FlowDesk productivity app explainer — SFW commercial sample

camera.secondary: product hero push-in on solution beat

guardrails: synthetic talent only — no real person likeness, no celebrity mimicry
end guard mandatory on every generated segment for seamless assembly
one set_id and one style_id per scene — never blend mid-take
lip-sync speech_text must appear in video_prompt when role is speaking
duration per shot 5–15s (API clip discipline); prefer 7–9s for seamless extend chains
never hold dead stillness or dead frame at segment end
no unsubstantiated claims — mark [CLAIM REQUIRES VERIFICATION] in speech until legal approves
brand-safe language — no competitor bashing unless scripted and approved
synthetic presenter only — no real person likeness
accurate color reproduction for product shots when product visible
CTA must be single clear action — one verb, one destination
